__fixture__.summary: A battery-backed machine sleeps and wakes while remote, debug, task, and preview surfaces are present. Local context survives wake and any display reconnect, but live authority rebinding remains explicit.

topology.starting_arrangement: dual-display workspace with editor, remote terminal, task output, and debug panes

preserve: recent focus chain if the target remains visible

must_not_happen: wake restores focus to a hidden or disconnected surface
display reconnect strands the active pane off-screen
a dialog remains attached to a window that is no longer reachable

restorable_context: terminal transcript, title, and cwd hints
live_authority_requires_reauthorization: browser callback or approval ticket state
must_not_happen: wake silently replays a remote command
a privileged callback resumes without revalidation
support export hides whether the pane reconnected or stayed unavailable
